series_metadata.series_description: The Client Health Records includes all original treatment documentation on clients who have been through a rehabilitation program or evaluation at the J. Leonard Camera Center or the Walker Center.

retention_rules.disposition: Microform: Transfer the original microfilm to an offsite records facility. Retain the original microfilm for 10 years. Copies of the microfilm are to be retained in office for 10 years. ; Paper: Retain in office 3 years after treatment is complete, then microfilm. Destroy hardcopy after microfilm checked for quality assurance., Microform: Burn ; Paper: Shred
